input_text: Korang jangan beli kat kedai Ah Kow tu lagi, dah la harga mahal, duit tu semua masuk poket kaum dia je. Kita kena support peniaga Melayu, boikot habis-habisan kedai Cina!
reason: Calls for ethnic-based business boycott, framing Chinese-owned businesses as the enemy and urging communal economic warfare.
suggested_rewrite: Kita patut support peniaga tempatan tanpa mengira bangsa. Kalau ada isu harga, kita boleh bandingkan dan pilih yang berpatutan.

input_text: Semua gerai mamak kat area ni kena boikot. Diorang bukan rakyat Malaysia pun, rampas peluang bisnes orang kita. Share senarai kedai yang kena elak ni.
reason: Promotes boycott of mamak businesses based on ethnicity and questions their citizenship status, inciting communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada kebimbangan tentang lesen perniagaan, buat laporan kepada pihak berkuasa. Kita perlu hormati semua peniaga yang beroperasi secara sah.

input_text: Jom kita viral senarai kedai Cina yang tak halal tapi claim halal. Masa untuk orang Melayu bangkit dan boikot semua kedai diorang. Nanti bankrap baru tahu!
reason: Spreads unverified halal status claims to justify ethnic boycott campaign, combining misinformation with communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada syak tentang status halal sesebuah kedai, sila semak sijil JAKIM atau buat aduan rasmi. Jangan sebarkan maklumat tanpa pengesahan.

input_text: Bro, tengok la Shopee tu, semua seller Cina. Platform tu memang sengaja nak singkirkan peniaga Melayu. Kita kena boikot dan buat platform sendiri!
reason: Promotes conspiracy that e-commerce platform deliberately favours one ethnic group and calls for ethnic-based boycott.
suggested_rewrite: Kalau ada kebimbangan tentang keadilan platform e-dagang, kita boleh buat aduan rasmi. Semua peniaga ada hak sama rata untuk berjaya.

input_text: Kat kampung aku dah takde kedai runcit Melayu. Semua dah kena rampas Cina. Kawan-kawan, jangan beli kat diorang, walau harga murah sekali pun. Duit tu untuk lawan kita!
reason: Frames ethnic Chinese business owners as adversaries 'merampas' and calls for total ethnic boycott even at personal cost.
suggested_rewrite: Memang penting untuk menyokong peniaga tempatan. Tapi kita boleh support semua peniaga yang berkhidmat untuk komuniti tanpa mengira latar belakang.

input_text: Senarai kedai emas milik pendatang yang kena boikot: 1) Kedai XXX Jalan Tuanku 2) Kedai YYY Petaling. Diorang tipu timbang emas, memang perangai bangsa diorang.
reason: Names specific businesses for boycott while making ethnic slurs about cheating, targeting individuals and attributing fraud to an entire ethnic group.
suggested_rewrite: Jika anda mengalami masalah penipuan di kedai emas, sila buat laporan kepada KPDNHEP. Setiap aduan akan disiasat tanpa mengira pemilik kedai.

input_text: Kenapa kita nak bagi duit kat kedai hardware Cina? Diorang monopoli habis sampai Melayu tak boleh masuk bisnes ni. Boikot dan beli online je dari peniaga bumiputera.
reason: Calls for ethnic boycott of hardware stores based on race, framing legitimate business competition as ethnic monopoly.
suggested_rewrite: Kita boleh sokong peniaga bumiputera sambil menghargai persaingan sihat. Kerajaan ada pelbagai program untuk bantu usahawan baharu masuk pasaran.

input_text: Setiap sen yang korang belanja kat kedai diorang tu, adalah peluru yang diorang guna untuk tindas kita. Boikot sekarang atau menyesal kemudian! #BoikotCina
reason: Uses violent metaphor linking economic activity to ethnic oppression and promotes racial boycott hashtag.
suggested_rewrite: Sebagai pengguna, kita ada hak memilih. Tapi pilihan kita sepatutnya berdasarkan kualiti dan harga, bukan berdasarkan bangsa peniaga.

input_text: Aku dah compile satu list restoran yang patut diboikot sebab owner bukan Melayu tapi berselindung guna nama Melayu. Diorang ni penipu, nak tipu orang Islam!
reason: Creates ethnic profiling list of businesses and spreads unverified claims of deception, combining misinformation with communal targeting.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada keraguan tentang status halal atau pemilikan restoran, semak dengan JAKIM. Jangan sebarkan tuduhan tanpa bukti.

input_text: Diorang ni pendatang je, datang Malaysia tumpang duduk tapi nak demand macam-macam. Balik la negara asal korang kalau tak suka sini!
reason: Uses 'pendatang' slur against fellow citizens, denying their constitutional right as Malaysians and telling them to leave the country.
suggested_rewrite: Semua rakyat Malaysia ada hak untuk bersuara. Perbezaan pendapat adalah normal dalam masyarakat demokratik.

input_text: Nak jadi PM pun nak? Pendatang tau diri la sikit. Tanah ni tanah Melayu, korang patut bersyukur dah bagi kerakyatan dulu.
reason: Denies political rights of citizens from minority backgrounds using 'pendatang' rhetoric and frames citizenship as a conditional favour.
suggested_rewrite: Perlembagaan Malaysia memberi hak kepada semua warganegara untuk terlibat dalam politik. Kepelbagaian kepimpinan boleh memperkukuh negara.

input_text: Pendatang Cina ni memang tak pernah bersyukur. Dah bagi IC, tanah, peluang bisnes, masih nak lebih. Kalau tak suka, pindah la ke Singapura!
reason: Labels Chinese Malaysians as ungrateful 'pendatang' despite being citizens for generations, and dismisses their concerns.
suggested_rewrite: Rakyat Malaysia dari semua kaum menyumbang kepada pembangunan negara. Perbincangan tentang hak dan peluang perlu dilakukan dengan rasa hormat.

input_text: India ni lagi teruk. Pendatang dari Tamil Nadu, dah berapa generasi masih tak boleh cakap BM betul. Macam mana nak jadi rakyat Malaysia sejati?
reason: Attacks Malaysian Indians as permanent outsiders, questioning their citizenship legitimacy based on language proficiency stereotypes.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia kaya dengan kepelbagaian bahasa. Ramai rakyat Malaysia fasih dalam pelbagai bahasa termasuk Bahasa Malaysia.

input_text: Pendatang-pendatang ni dah mula berani. Dulu minta tolong nak duduk sini, sekarang nak rampas tanah kita pulak. Kita kena bersatu halau diorang!
reason: Escalates 'pendatang' rhetoric to calls for collective action to expel fellow citizens, approaching incitement.
suggested_rewrite: Isu tanah dan hartanah memerlukan penyelesaian melalui saluran undang-undang. Semua warganegara dilindungi oleh Perlembagaan.

input_text: Aku tak faham la kenapa bagi kaum pendatang belajar universiti percuma. Anak Melayu sendiri tak cukup tempat. Usir diorang dari kampus!
reason: Uses 'pendatang' to delegitimise fellow citizens' access to education and calls for their removal from universities.
suggested_rewrite: Isu akses pendidikan tinggi memerlukan perbincangan konstruktif. Kerajaan perlu pastikan peluang pendidikan mencukupi untuk semua rakyat.

input_text: Jangan bagi pendatang peluang langsung. Kerja pun sepatutnya kita orang asal dulu. Diorang boleh kutip sampah je, tu pun dah bagus.
reason: Dehumanises fellow citizens as 'pendatang' fit only for menial work, stripping dignity and equal opportunity.
suggested_rewrite: Peluang pekerjaan perlu dibuka adil untuk semua rakyat berdasarkan kelayakan. Setiap pekerjaan ada maruahnya.

input_text: Generasi muda pendatang lagi teruk dari mak bapak diorang. Dulu tunduk sikit, sekarang berani cabar hak tuan tanah. Kita kena ajar diorang!
reason: Frames younger citizens from minority backgrounds as increasingly threatening 'pendatang' and implies they need to be taught a lesson.
suggested_rewrite: Generasi muda Malaysia semakin bersuara dalam pelbagai isu. Ini tanda kematangan demokrasi yang perlu disambut baik.

input_text: Korang tengok tak video pendatang Cina hina bahasa Melayu? Tu la, bagi muka sangat. Dah sampai masa kita tarik balik kerakyatan diorang!
reason: Calls for revoking citizenship of ethnic minorities based on an unverified video, treating constitutional rights as revocable privileges.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada individu yang menghina bahasa kebangsaan, tindakan undang-undang boleh diambil. Kerakyatan tidak boleh ditarik sewenang-wenangnya.

input_text: Amaran kepada semua ibu bapa Melayu! Lelaki Kristian ni memang target anak gadis kita untuk kristiankan. Jangan bagi anak korang bercampur dengan diorang!
reason: Spreads fear about Christian men targeting Muslim women for conversion, promoting religious segregation and intergroup suspicion.
suggested_rewrite: Pendidikan agama yang kukuh boleh membantu anak-anak memahami pegangan mereka. Perkahwinan antara agama ada prosedur undang-undang yang jelas.

input_text: Kalau anak korang kahwin bukan Islam, dah siap la tu. Masuk Kristian senyap-senyap. Diorang memang ada agenda, aku dah tengok banyak kes macam ni.
reason: Spreads unverified claims about secret religious conversion agenda through interfaith marriage, stoking fear without evidence.
suggested_rewrite: Perkahwinan campur ada cabaran tersendiri. Pasangan boleh berbincang secara terbuka dan mendapatkan nasihat dari kaunselor bertauliah.

input_text: Perempuan Melayu yang kahwin Cina tu dah murtad. Kita sebagai umat Islam wajib kutuk dan pulaukan mereka. Jangan bagi muka langsung!
reason: Declares apostasy and calls for social ostracism of Muslim women in interfaith marriages, targeting individuals for religious punishment.
suggested_rewrite: Isu perkahwinan dan agama adalah peribadi. Jika ada kebimbangan, boleh merujuk kepada pihak agama untuk bimbingan tanpa menghukum individu.

input_text: Gereja-gereja dah mula buat program khas untuk tarik budak Melayu masuk Kristian melalui perkahwinan. Ini perang salib zaman moden, korang!
reason: Makes inflammatory claim about churches running conversion programs via marriage, using 'Crusade' framing to incite religious fear.
suggested_rewrite: Dakwaan tentang program penukaran agama perlu disahkan. Jika ada bukti, buat laporan rasmi kepada JAIS atau pihak berkuasa agama.

input_text: Bro, jiran aku punya anak perempuan dah convert Hindu sebab nak kahwin dengan budak India. Family dia semua kena potong hubungan, memang diorang layak kena tu.
reason: Celebrates social punishment of an individual for religious conversion through marriage, promoting ostracism and communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Keputusan agama dan perkahwinan memerlukan sokongan keluarga. Jika ada perbezaan pendapat, dialog dan bimbingan lebih berkesan daripada pemutausan hubungan.

input_text: Aku share ni sebab nak sedarkan korang. Lelaki bukan Islam yang nak kahwin perempuan Melayu tu bukan sebab cinta, tapi nak musnahkan akidah anak kita. Tolak semua diorang!
reason: Paints all non-Muslim men pursuing Muslim women as having a conversion agenda, promoting blanket rejection based on religion.
suggested_rewrite: Perkahwinan memerlukan persefahaman. Dalam konteks Malaysia, perkahwinan orang Islam dikawal oleh undang-undang syariah yang jelas.

input_text: Dah berapa ramai Melayu murtad sebab kahwin dengan orang Cina tahun ni? Kerajaan kena bertindak tegas, tutup semua pusat ibadat bukan Islam berdekatan kawasan Melayu!
reason: Uses unverified apostasy claims to call for closing non-Muslim places of worship, violating constitutional freedom of religion.
suggested_rewrite: Isu akidah perlu ditangani melalui pendidikan agama yang lebih berkesan. Kebebasan beragama dilindungi Perlembagaan untuk semua rakyat.

input_text: Aku warning semua parents Melayu, kalau anak korang belajar sekolah mission tu, diorang akan kena indoktrinasi Kristian dan akhirnya kahwin Kristian. Tarik keluar sekarang!
reason: Spreads fear about mission schools indoctrinating Muslim students toward conversion through marriage, based on unfounded conspiracy.
suggested_rewrite: Sekolah mission di Malaysia mengikut kurikulum kebangsaan. Ibu bapa boleh membuat pilihan sekolah berdasarkan kualiti pendidikan dan memantau perkembangan anak.

input_text: Boss Cina aku ni memang rasis. Semua staff Melayu kena buli. Jom kita ramai-ramai pergi office dia dan bagi dia pengajaran. Biar dia tahu siapa tuan tanah sini!
reason: Escalates workplace grievance into call for group confrontation with ethnic undertones and territorial threats.
suggested_rewrite: Diskriminasi di tempat kerja boleh dilaporkan kepada Jabatan Tenaga Kerja. Ada saluran rasmi untuk menangani isu ini tanpa konfrontasi.

input_text: Syarikat ni memang tak amik Melayu langsung. Semua jawatan atas Cina je. Kita kena serbu office diorang dan tunjuk kekuatan kita sebagai majoriti!
reason: Turns workplace discrimination complaint into a call to storm an office and demonstrate ethnic majority power, crossing into incitement.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada diskriminasi pengambilan pekerja, buat aduan kepada JTK atau SUHAKAM. Tindakan undang-undang lebih berkesan daripada konfrontasi.

input_text: Aku dah kumpul nama semua supervisor India yang buli pekerja Melayu kat kilang ni. Lepas shift malam nanti, kita tunggu diorang kat parking. Biar diorang rasa.
reason: Plans physical intimidation of named individuals after work based on ethnic targeting, constituting vigilante threats.
suggested_rewrite: Buli di tempat kerja perlu dilaporkan kepada HR atau Jabatan Tenaga Kerja. Tindakan fizikal boleh mengakibatkan masalah undang-undang.

input_text: Manager Cina aku suruh aku tanggal tudung kalau nak naik pangkat. Ni bukan soal agama ke? Kita kena himpun depan kilang dan tuntut dia dipecat!
reason: While the discrimination complaint may be legitimate, escalating to mass gathering demand crosses into incitement rather than proper redress.
suggested_rewrite: Diskriminasi berdasarkan agama di tempat kerja melanggar undang-undang. Buat aduan rasmi kepada JTK dan SUHAKAM untuk tindakan sewajarnya.

input_text: Kilang Cina kat kawasan perindustrian ni memang exploit pekerja Melayu. Gaji rendah, overtime tak bayar. Kita kena buat kumpulan dan serang kilang tu ramai-ramai!
reason: Turns legitimate labour complaint into ethnic attack plan against a factory, escalating from grievance to violence incitement.
suggested_rewrite: Eksploitasi pekerja perlu ditangani melalui aduan kepada JTK dan kesatuan sekerja. Hak pekerja dilindungi tanpa mengira siapa majikan.

input_text: Abang-abang rider semua, kalau nampak restaurant owner Cina yang tak bayar gaji runner, jangan report polis. Kita handle cara kita sendiri. Ramai-ramai pegi confront!
reason: Organises group vigilante action against business owners along ethnic lines instead of using legal channels for wage disputes.
suggested_rewrite: Isu gaji tidak dibayar boleh dilaporkan kepada JTK atau Tribunal Tuntutan Pekerja. Mereka boleh bantu dapatkan hak anda secara sah.

input_text: Aku dengar syarikat IT kat Bangsar tu tak pernah hire Melayu. Semua Cina dan India je. Jom kita buat demo depan ofis diorang sampai diorang tutup bisnes!
reason: Escalates unverified hiring discrimination claim into calls for protests aimed at shutting down a business based on ethnic grievance.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada bukti diskriminasi dalam pengambilan pekerja, buat aduan rasmi kepada JTK. Demonstrasi tidak akan menyelesaikan isu ini.

input_text: Dah la company Cina ni potong gaji kita time COVID, sekarang bonus pun takde. Staff Cina semua dapat. Kita mogok dan blok pintu masuk esok pagi, siapa berani?
reason: Organises illegal blockade of a workplace framed as ethnic discrimination retaliation, escalating a pay dispute into communal action.
suggested_rewrite: Ketidakadilan dalam pembahagian bonus perlu dilaporkan kepada HR dan JTK. Tindakan perindustrian ada prosedur sah yang perlu diikuti.

input_text: Stop supporting Chinese-owned businesses in Malaysia! Every ringgit you spend there is funding their plan to dominate our economy. Boycott list attached.
reason: Promotes ethnic boycott with conspiracy framing about economic domination, distributing targeted boycott lists.
suggested_rewrite: As consumers, we can make informed choices based on quality and price. Economic competition benefits everyone when it's fair.

input_text: Indian businessmen in KL are stealing market share from Bumiputera traders. Time to fight back with our wallets. Don't buy from them, period!
reason: Frames legitimate business competition as theft by Indian entrepreneurs and calls for ethnicity-based economic boycott.
suggested_rewrite: Healthy business competition benefits consumers. If there are concerns about unfair practices, report them to the relevant authorities.

input_text: Just found out the bubble tea shop near my office is owned by a Chinese national, not Malaysian. Boycott all Chinese-owned F&B! They're taking over our food scene!
reason: Uses one unverified claim about foreign ownership to justify blanket boycott of all Chinese-owned food businesses.
suggested_rewrite: If you have concerns about foreign-owned businesses operating without proper licences, report to SSM or the local authority.

input_text: Why are we giving our money to mamak restaurants? These people send all profits back to India and contribute nothing to Malaysia. Full boycott now!
reason: Falsely claims mamak restaurants send all profits overseas, using misinformation to drive ethnic boycott campaign.
suggested_rewrite: Mamak restaurants are a beloved part of Malaysian food culture. If there are concerns about business practices, proper channels exist for complaints.

input_text: My company decided to use a Malay vendor and the quality was terrible. Typical. This is why people prefer Chinese companies - at least they deliver. Boycott Bumi vendors!
reason: Uses one negative experience to stereotype all Bumiputera vendors as low quality and calls for boycotting them.
suggested_rewrite: Vendor selection should be based on track record and capability. One bad experience doesn't reflect an entire community.

input_text: Massive boycott campaign against Malay-owned restaurants that refuse to serve non-halal options. They can't force their religious rules on the rest of us! Share this list widely.
reason: Frames halal food practices as religious imposition and organises boycott against Muslim businesses for following their faith.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia has diverse dining options. Restaurants choose their menus freely. Customers can patronise establishments that suit their preferences.

input_text: These 'pendatangs' have been here for generations but still can't speak proper Malay. Send them back to China where they belong. Malaysia is for Malays!
reason: Uses pendatang slur against citizens, demands their deportation, and denies Malaysia's multi-ethnic constitutional reality.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia is a multi-ethnic nation. All citizens have equal rights regardless of background. Language proficiency varies across all communities.

input_text: The problem with Malaysian Indians is that they still think they're in India. Pendatang mentality never changes. They should be grateful we even let them stay here.
reason: Labels Malaysian Indians as foreigners with 'pendatang mentality' and frames their citizenship as a concession rather than a right.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysian Indians have contributed to the nation since before independence. Cultural diversity strengthens our national identity.

input_text: Why should pendatang communities get representation in parliament? They're guests in this country. Tanah Melayu means MALAY LAND. Know your place!
reason: Denies democratic rights of minority citizens by framing them as guests without political standing.
suggested_rewrite: Parliamentary representation is a constitutional right for all Malaysian citizens. Our democracy is strengthened by diverse voices.

input_text: Every time I see a Chinese person complaining about NEP, I want to scream. You're pendatang! Be grateful for what you have and stop demanding more!
reason: Silences legitimate policy discussion by deploying 'pendatang' label to strip citizens of their right to critique government policy.
suggested_rewrite: Policy discussions like those around NEP are part of healthy democracy. All citizens can engage in constructive debate about national policies.

input_text: Pendatang children taking up spaces in our public universities while Bumiputera kids can't get in. This country is going to the dogs. Revoke their scholarship rights!
reason: Uses pendatang label to argue for stripping educational rights from minority citizens, ignoring merit-based admission principles.
suggested_rewrite: University admissions should balance merit with equitable access. Education policy reforms can be discussed constructively without targeting any community.

input_text: These immigrants' descendants call themselves Malaysian but celebrate Chinese New Year more than Hari Raya. Pendatang will always be pendatang. Can't change their DNA.
reason: Questions the Malaysian identity of Chinese citizens based on cultural practices and uses biological essentialist language.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia's multicultural celebrations are what make our country unique. Chinese New Year is a national holiday enjoyed by all Malaysians.

input_text: Tamil schools are proof that pendatang refuse to integrate. Close all vernacular schools and force them to assimilate. This is Malaysia, not Tamil Nadu!
reason: Uses pendatang rhetoric to attack constitutionally protected vernacular education and demands forced cultural assimilation.
suggested_rewrite: Vernacular schools are protected under the Constitution. Education policy should focus on quality outcomes while respecting linguistic diversity.

input_text: Warning to all Muslim parents: Christian missionaries are targeting young Malay girls through romantic relationships. They seduce, marry, and convert. Stay vigilant!
reason: Spreads conspiracy about Christian missionaries using romance for conversion, fearmongering without evidence.
suggested_rewrite: Parents can strengthen their children's faith through education and open dialogue. Interfaith relationships are governed by clear legal frameworks in Malaysia.

input_text: My cousin married a Hindu man and within a year she left Islam. This is what happens when we allow our daughters to mix with non-Muslims. Ban interfaith marriages completely!
reason: Uses anecdotal case to call for banning interfaith marriages, promoting religious segregation and restricting constitutional freedoms.
suggested_rewrite: Interfaith marriages can be complex. Support from family and religious counsellors helps couples navigate differences while respecting both faiths.

input_text: The rise of Buddhist-Muslim marriages in Penang is a deliberate strategy to dilute Islam in Malaysia. Wake up Muslims! This is demographic warfare!
reason: Frames interfaith marriages as deliberate demographic warfare against Islam, spreading conspiracy theories to create religious panic.
suggested_rewrite: Personal choices in marriage reflect individual circumstances. Malaysia's religious laws already provide clear guidelines for interfaith unions.

input_text: Non-Muslim men who marry Malay women should be investigated by JAKIM. They're converting on paper but practicing their old religion at home. Expose these frauds!
reason: Calls for religious surveillance of interfaith couples and exposure of private religious practices, violating privacy and dignity.
suggested_rewrite: Sincerity of conversion is a personal spiritual journey. JAKIM provides guidance and classes for converts to support their faith development.

input_text: Every Chinese man who converts to Islam to marry a Malay girl will eventually leave the religion. They're just using our women. Don't fall for their tricks, sisters!
reason: Stereotypes all Chinese Muslim converts as insincere and frames interfaith marriage as exploitation, breeding ethnic-religious distrust.
suggested_rewrite: Conversion sincerity varies by individual, not ethnicity. Muslim communities should welcome and support sincere converts regardless of background.

input_text: Liberal Malay girls who date non-Muslims are traitors to their race and religion. Share their photos so the community knows who these shame-bringers are!
reason: Calls for public shaming and doxxing of Malay women in interfaith relationships, violating privacy and dignity.
suggested_rewrite: Relationship choices are personal matters. Instead of shaming individuals, communities can focus on providing positive guidance and support.

input_text: Chinese companies in Penang systematically refuse to hire Malays for management roles. Time to organize a protest outside their HQ. Let them feel our anger!
reason: Escalates unverified hiring discrimination claim into organised protest driven by ethnic anger rather than legal remedies.
suggested_rewrite: If there's evidence of discriminatory hiring practices, report to the Labour Department or SUHAKAM for investigation and proper action.

input_text: My Indian friend was passed over for promotion AGAIN because the boss only promotes Chinese staff. We need to name and shame these racist companies publicly!
reason: While the discrimination concern may be valid, escalating to public naming and shaming campaigns can lead to vigilante harassment of businesses.
suggested_rewrite: Workplace discrimination is unacceptable. Your friend can file a complaint with the Labour Department or seek legal advice for proper recourse.

input_text: All Malay workers at that factory should walk out together and block the entrance. The Chinese management treats us like slaves. No work until they treat us as equals!
reason: Calls for illegal blockade of a workplace framed in ethnic terms, escalating labour issues into communal confrontation.
suggested_rewrite: Workers facing unfair treatment should contact MTUC or the Labour Department. Legal industrial action requires proper procedures to be effective.

input_text: That Malay HR manager deliberately screens out non-Malay candidates. I've compiled proof. Let's flood their Google reviews and destroy their reputation until she's fired!
reason: Organises targeted online campaign to destroy an individual's career through review bombing instead of proper channels.
suggested_rewrite: If you have evidence of discriminatory hiring, submit it to the Labour Department. Proper complaints are more effective than online campaigns.

input_text: Indian supervisors in this factory always give overtime to their own kind and leave Malay workers with basic salary only. Gather the boys, we'll confront them tonight after shift.
reason: Plans group confrontation of supervisors based on ethnic grievance, with threatening implications of after-hours intimidation.
suggested_rewrite: Unfair overtime distribution should be reported to HR and the Labour Department. Document the pattern and file a formal complaint.

input_text: Chinese employers in JB industrial zone are modern-day slave masters. They exploit Malay workers and laugh at us. Share this post and let's organise a mass demonstration at the zone!
reason: Uses inflammatory 'slave master' rhetoric to characterise all Chinese employers and calls for mass demonstration at an industrial zone.
suggested_rewrite: Labour exploitation is a serious issue that affects workers across all sectors. Report violations to JTK for investigation and enforcement.

input_text: 马来人的店不要去啦，卫生又差服务又烂。我们华人应该互相支持，只光顾华人的店。分享这个boycott名单给大家！
reason: Stereotypes Malay businesses as unhygienic and calls for ethnic-based patronage boycott with a boycott list.
suggested_rewrite: 选择光顾哪家店应该基于服务质量和个人喜好，不应该以种族来决定。每家店都有自己的优缺点。

input_text: 印度人开的金店千万不要去！我上次买的金链掺假，这些人就是会骗华人。大家boycott所有印度人的金店！
reason: Uses one alleged negative experience to brand all Indian-owned gold shops as fraudulent and calls for ethnic boycott.
suggested_rewrite: 如果遇到金饰掺假问题，应向KPDNHEP投诉。不应该因为个别事件就针对整个族群的商家。

input_text: 这些土著优惠政策就是在抢我们华人的饭碗！从今天起全面抵制所有拿了BUMI折扣的发展商，让他们知道华人的钱不是那么好赚的！
reason: Frames Bumiputera policies as theft and calls for collective ethnic boycott of developers who participate in lawful government programs.
suggested_rewrite: 国家政策可以通过正当渠道来讨论和辩论。作为消费者，我们可以基于价格和质量做出理性选择。

input_text: 马来档口的食物根本不干净，我亲眼看到他们用手抓来抓去。华人朋友们不要贪便宜去吃，宁愿多花一点钱支持自己人！
reason: Stereotypes Malay food stalls as unhygienic and promotes ethnic-based consumer choices using derogatory framing.
suggested_rewrite: 食品卫生标准适用于所有餐饮业者。如果发现卫生问题，可以向卫生局投诉，不应该以族群来一概而论。

input_text: 他们一直叫我们pendatang，说我们是外来者。可是我们华人建设这个国家付出了多少？马来人才是最懒的一群，只会靠政府吃饭！
reason: While reacting to pendatang rhetoric, retaliates with equally harmful ethnic stereotyping of Malays as lazy and government-dependent.
suggested_rewrite: 所有族群都为马来西亚的发展做出了贡献。'Pendatang'这种标签不应该被使用，因为我们都是马来西亚公民。

input_text: 马来政客又在叫我们pendatang了。他们忘了是谁交最多税？没有华人的经济贡献这个国家早就完蛋了。让他们去吃土吧！
reason: Responds to pendatang rhetoric with economic superiority claims and dehumanising dismissal of Malays, perpetuating mutual hostility.
suggested_rewrite: 'Pendatang'标签确实令人不安。我们可以通过建设性对话来反对这种言论，而不是用另一种偏见来回应。

input_text: 既然他们当我们是外来者，那我们华人就不要再缴税了！看看没有我们的钱，这个国家还能撑多久。Pendatang的钱你们不配花！
reason: Incites tax rebellion framed as ethnic protest, which is unlawful, and frames national revenue as ethnically owned.
suggested_rewrite: 反对不公平言论不应该通过违法行为。所有公民都有纳税义务，也有权利争取平等对待。

input_text: 被叫pendatang就算了，现在连工作机会都被抢走。马来人拿了quota进政府，私人界也要搞固打制？华人还有活路吗？组织起来反抗！
reason: Escalates grievances about affirmative action policies into a call for organised ethnic resistance, framing it as survival.
suggested_rewrite: 就业政策的公平性可以通过合法渠道来倡议和改善。所有公民都有权在公平的环境中竞争工作机会。

input_text: 又一个华人女生嫁马来人masuk Islam了。为什么我们的女儿都被骗去？华人家长醒醒吧，不要让你女儿和马来人交往！
reason: Frames conversion for marriage as being 'cheated' and calls for ethnic-religious segregation in relationships.
suggested_rewrite: 跨族群婚姻是个人选择。家长可以与孩子开放沟通，了解他们的想法，而不是以族群来限制交往。

input_text: 华人masuk Islam之后就变了一个人，跟家人断绝关系。这就是伊斯兰教的本质，把人洗脑！千万不要让你的孩子嫁给或娶马来人！
reason: Characterises Islam as brainwashing and uses family estrangement anecdotes to promote ethnic-religious segregation in marriage.
suggested_rewrite: 宗教转变可能带来家庭关系的变化。通过开放沟通和相互尊重，家庭可以在宗教差异中维持关系。

input_text: 马来人专门瞄准华人女生，先谈恋爱再逼你convert。这是有组织的宗教渗透！分享出去让更多华人父母知道这个阴谋！
reason: Spreads conspiracy theory about organised religious conversion targeting Chinese women through romantic relationships.
suggested_rewrite: 跨族群恋爱中的宗教问题需要双方坦诚沟通。马来西亚的婚姻法律对宗教要求有明确规定。

input_text: 我表妹嫁了马来人之后，连猪肉都不能吃，过年也不能拜祖先。这种婚姻就是文化灭绝！华人不应该让步！抵制跨种族婚姻！
reason: Frames lifestyle changes in interfaith marriage as 'cultural genocide' and calls for boycotting interracial marriages.
suggested_rewrite: 跨文化婚姻确实需要双方做出调整。每对夫妻可以找到尊重双方文化传统的平衡方式。

input_text: 马来公司根本不会升华人的，我做了十年还是原地踏步。以后华人只请华人，让马来人自己去搞他们的公司，看他们能撑多久！
reason: Turns personal workplace frustration into calls for ethnic segregation in employment, dismissing Malay business capability.
suggested_rewrite: 晋升不公平可以通过正式渠道投诉。职场应该以能力为本，不分种族。

input_text: 华人老板被告歧视就要关公司，马来人的GLC歧视华人却没事？太不公平了！我们要组织华人企业家联合抗议这种双重标准！
reason: While raising a potentially valid double-standard concern, frames it purely in ethnic terms and calls for ethnically organised protest.
suggested_rewrite: 职场歧视无论来自哪方都不应被容忍。可以通过法律途径和政策倡导来争取公平的执法标准。

input_text: 我们公司那个马来经理故意刁难华人员工，天天给华人最难的任务。兄弟们一起去confrontation他，给他一点颜色看看！
reason: Escalates workplace discrimination complaint into a group confrontation threat against an individual manager along ethnic lines.
suggested_rewrite: 如果经理不公平分配工作，应向HR或劳工部投诉。保留证据，通过正式渠道解决问题。

input_text: சீனக் கடைகளில் வாங்காதீர்கள்! அவர்கள் இந்தியர்களை ஏமாற்றுகிறார்கள். நம் மக்கள் கடைகளில் மட்டுமே வாங்குவோம். இந்த boycott பட்டியலை share செய்யுங்கள்!
reason: Calls for ethnic boycott of Chinese shops with stereotyping claim of cheating Indians, distributing boycott lists.
suggested_rewrite: நுகர்வோர் உரிமை எல்லோருக்கும் உண்டு. ஏமாற்றுதல் இருந்தால் KPDNHEP-க்கு புகார் செய்யுங்கள். இனத்தை வைத்து புறக்கணிக்க வேண்டாம்.

input_text: மலாய் கடை சாப்பாடு சுத்தமில்லை, விலையும் அதிகம். இந்திய சமூகம் ஒன்றுபட்டு நம் கடைகளை மட்டும் ஆதரிப்போம். அவர்கள் கடைகளை boycott செய்வோம்!
reason: Stereotypes all Malay food establishments as dirty and expensive, calling for ethnic community boycott.
suggested_rewrite: உணவகத் தேர்வு தரம் மற்றும் விருப்பத்தின் அடிப்படையில் இருக்க வேண்டும். சுகாதார பிரச்சினை இருந்தால் சுகாதார அதிகாரிகளிடம் புகார் செய்யலாம்.

input_text: சீனர்கள் எல்லா தொழிலையும் ஆக்கிரமித்து விட்டார்கள். இந்தியர்களுக்கு எந்த வாய்ப்பும் இல்லை. இன்றிலிருந்து சீனக் கடைகளை முழுமையாக புறக்கணிப்போம்!
reason: Claims Chinese have taken over all businesses leaving no opportunities for Indians, calling for complete ethnic boycott.
suggested_rewrite: வணிக வாய்ப்புகள் அனைவருக்கும் திறந்திருக்க வேண்டும். அரசாங்க திட்டங்கள் மூலம் இந்திய சமூக தொழில்முனைவோரை ஊக்குவிக்கலாம்.

input_text: நம்மை pendatang என்று சொல்கிறார்கள், ஆனால் ரப்பர் தோட்டங்களில் உழைத்தது யார்? மலாய்க்காரர்கள் சோம்பேறிகள், அரசாங்க உதவி இல்லாமல் ஒன்றும் செய்ய மாட்டார்கள்!
reason: While reacting to pendatang labelling, retaliates with stereotype that Malays are lazy and dependent on government aid.
suggested_rewrite: 'Pendatang' என்ற சொல் தவறானது. எல்லா சமூகங்களும் மலேசியாவின் வளர்ச்சிக்கு பங்களித்துள்ளன. ஒருவரை ஒருவர் மதிப்போம்.

input_text: நாங்கள் pendatang அல்ல! மலேசிய இந்தியர்கள் இந்த நாட்டின் சொந்தக்காரர்கள். எங்களை வெளியேற்ற முயற்சித்தால், நாங்கள் தெருவில் இறங்கி போராடுவோம்!
reason: While the rejection of pendatang label is valid, the threat of street protests escalates to potential incitement.
suggested_rewrite: நாங்கள் pendatang அல்ல, மலேசிய குடிமக்கள். சட்டரீதியான வழிகளில் நமது உரிமைகளை நிலைநாட்ட முடியும்.

input_text: மலாய் பையன்களை காதலிக்காதீர்கள்! அவர்கள் உங்களை Islam-க்கு மாற்றி, நம் கலாச்சாரத்தை அழிப்பார்கள். இந்துக்கோயிலை காப்பாற்ற நம் பெண்களை காப்பாற்றுங்கள்!
reason: Warns against relationships with Malay men framing them as cultural destroyers, using temple protection rhetoric to promote segregation.
suggested_rewrite: பல கலாச்சார திருமணங்களில் சவால்கள் உண்டு. குடும்பங்கள் திறந்த மனதுடன் பேசுவது முக்கியம். தனிப்பட்ட தேர்வுகளை மதிப்போம்.

input_text: என் மகள் முஸ்லிம் பையனை கல்யாணம் செய்தால், அவளை குடும்பத்தில் இருந்து தள்ளி வைப்பேன். Islam-க்கு மாறுவது நம் பரம்பரை துரோகம்! எல்லா இந்து பெற்றோரும் இப்படித்தான் இருக்க வேண்டும்!
reason: Threatens family ostracism for interfaith marriage and frames religious conversion as ancestral betrayal, urging all Hindu parents to do the same.
suggested_rewrite: குடும்ப உறவுகள் முக்கியம். மதம் மாற்றம் குறித்த கவலைகளை அன்புடன் பேசுவது, உறவை துண்டிப்பதை விட சிறந்தது.

input_text: கிறிஸ்தவ மிஷனரிகள் இந்திய இளைஞர்களை மதம் மாற்ற திருமணத்தை பயன்படுத்துகிறார்கள். இது ஒரு சதி! எல்லா கோயிலிலும் இதை எதிர்க்க வேண்டும்!
reason: Spreads conspiracy about Christian missionaries using marriage for conversion of Hindu youth, inciting religious opposition.
suggested_rewrite: மதம் மாற்றம் குறித்த கவலைகள் இருந்தால் இந்து சங்க தலைவர்களிடம் ஆலோசனை பெறலாம். ஆதாரமில்லாத குற்றச்சாட்டுகளை தவிர்க்கவும்.

input_text: சீன முதலாளிகள் இந்தியர்களை வேலைக்கு எடுப்பதில்லை. எடுத்தாலும் குறைந்த சம்பளம் தான். நாம் ஒன்று சேர்ந்து அவர்கள் factory-க்கு முன் போராட்டம் செய்வோம்!
reason: Escalates workplace discrimination complaint into organised protest at factories along ethnic lines.
suggested_rewrite: வேலை பாகுபாடு இருந்தால் தொழிலாளர் திணைக்களத்தில் புகார் செய்யுங்கள். சட்டரீதியான நடவடிக்கை மிகவும் பயனுள்ளது.

input_text: மலாய் supervisor எப்போதும் இந்தியர்களை கஷ்டமான வேலைக்கு போடுகிறான். இனி பொறுக்க முடியாது, shift முடிந்ததும் அவனை parking-ல் வைத்து lesson கற்பிப்போம்!
reason: Plans physical intimidation of a supervisor after work hours, constituting vigilante threat based on ethnic workplace grievance.
suggested_rewrite: வேலை ஒதுக்கீடு நியாயமற்றதாக இருந்தால், HR-க்கு புகார் செய்து ஆதாரங்களை சமர்ப்பிக்கவும். சட்ட வழிகள் மிகவும் பாதுகாப்பானது.

input_text: Guys, jom boycott semua Chinese-owned shops kat area kita. Diorang memang mark up harga for Malay customers. I've seen it myself. Support our own people la!
reason: Calls for ethnic boycott based on unverified price discrimination claim, using Malay-English code-switching common on Malaysian social media.
suggested_rewrite: If you notice unfair pricing, you can report it to KPDNHEP. But don't assume all businesses of one ethnicity are doing the same thing.

input_text: Eh bro, aku discover this mamak shop charges extra for non-Indian customers. Memang racist la. Kita kena boycott semua mamak shop dalam area ni. Spread the word!
reason: Extrapolates one alleged incident to justify boycott of all mamak restaurants in an area, spreading unverified discrimination claims.
suggested_rewrite: If a restaurant charges unfair prices, report to KPDNHEP with evidence. Don't generalise one incident to all restaurants of the same type.

input_text: Dah la Cina own 90% of businesses in KL, now they want to take over Malay areas too. Kita kena united and boycott habis. Every sen counts in this economic war, guys!
reason: Uses inflated statistics and war framing to justify ethnic business boycott, promoting economic segregation.
suggested_rewrite: Business competition should be welcomed as it benefits consumers. If there are genuine monopoly concerns, the Competition Commission handles these.

input_text: Semua kedai Indian barber kat town ni kena boycott la. They employ illegal workers and the hygiene is terrible. Only support kedai bumiputera ok? Let's go viral with this!
reason: Makes sweeping claims about illegal workers and hygiene in Indian barbershops to justify ethnic boycott.
suggested_rewrite: If you have concerns about unlicensed workers or hygiene, report to the authorities. Don't generalise issues to all businesses of one community.

input_text: These pendatang want equal rights konon. Bro, your ancestors came here as immigrants la. Be grateful we gave you citizenship. Don't push your luck tau!
reason: Deploys pendatang label with threat undertones, framing citizenship as a revocable gift and dismissing constitutional equal rights.
suggested_rewrite: All Malaysian citizens have equal constitutional rights regardless of ancestral background. We can discuss policy differences respectfully.

input_text: Aku fed up la dengan orang-orang pendatang ni. Nak demand this, demand that. If you don't like it here, balik tongsan la. Nobody asked you to stay!
reason: Uses pendatang slur with 'balik tongsan' (go back to China) rhetoric, denying fellow citizens their belonging in Malaysia.
suggested_rewrite: Disagreements are normal in a democracy. All citizens have the right to voice their concerns and work towards positive change.

input_text: Kan dah cakap, bagi pendatang peluang sikit they want to take the whole thing. Now Chinese schools demand more funding lagi. This is tanah Melayu, respect the tuan rumah!
reason: Frames legitimate education funding requests as pendatang overreach, using tuan rumah framing to dismiss minority rights.
suggested_rewrite: Education funding debates are part of normal governance. All taxpayers have the right to advocate for educational resources.

input_text: Pendatang India ni lagi satu hal. Dah la suka gaduh sesama sendiri, now want to claim they built this country. Please la, korang cuma tap rubber je dulu. Know your history!
reason: Dismisses Malaysian Indians' historical contributions with pendatang label and stereotypes about fighting, minimising their role in nation-building.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysian Indians have contributed significantly to the nation's development across many sectors. Every community's role in history deserves recognition.

input_text: My Malay friend nak kahwin Chinese girl but she refuse to convert. Now the family paksa dia masuk Islam. This is why interfaith marriage in Malaysia is a joke. Islam forces people la!
reason: Frames Islamic marriage requirements as coercion and characterises Islam as forcing conversions, disrespecting religious practices.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia's marriage laws have specific requirements for Muslim marriages. Couples can seek guidance from religious counsellors to understand the process.

input_text: Anak perempuan aku almost kena convert sebab boyfriend dia Hindu. Nasib baik I found out in time. Parents, please monitor your children's relationships. Jangan bagi campur with non-Muslims!
reason: Frames Hindu boyfriend as conversion threat and promotes monitoring and preventing interfaith relationships.
suggested_rewrite: Open communication with children about relationships and values is important. Parents can guide without promoting ethnic segregation.

input_text: Korang tau tak, there's a WhatsApp group specifically untuk match Christian men with Malay girls? Ini agenda Kristianisasi tau. Report and spread this info everywhere!
reason: Spreads unverified claim about organised Christianisation through matchmaking, inciting religious panic without evidence.
suggested_rewrite: Unverified claims about religious conversion activities should not be spread. If you have evidence, report to the religious authorities.

input_text: Aku rasa semua conversion for marriage ni should be investigated. Most Chinese yang masuk Islam untuk kahwin Melayu memang fake convert je. They still pray to their ancestors behind closed doors. Expose them!
reason: Stereotypes all Chinese Muslim converts as insincere and calls for investigating and exposing their private religious practices.
suggested_rewrite: Conversion sincerity is a personal spiritual matter. Religious authorities provide classes and support for converts. Private faith practices should be respected.

input_text: Bro this Chinese company kat Puchong memang racist habis. Only hire Chinese staff for management. Jom organize protest kat depan office diorang this Friday. Bring the whole gang!
reason: Organises group protest against a specific company based on ethnic discrimination claims without using proper legal channels.
suggested_rewrite: If there's evidence of discriminatory hiring, file a complaint with the Labour Department. Proper legal action is more effective than protests.

input_text: My Malay colleague kena fired sebab cakap pasal discrimination kat office. The Indian HR manager tu memang protect her own kind. Let's mass report this company and ruin their reputation online!
reason: Turns wrongful termination complaint into ethnic profiling of HR manager and calls for coordinated online reputation destruction.
suggested_rewrite: Wrongful termination can be challenged through the Industrial Court. Document everything and seek legal advice for the strongest case.

input_text: Semua Malay workers kat factory tu should gang up and refuse to work sampai that Chinese supervisor kena fire. Dia memang bully kita je. Kalau tak jalan, kita block the entrance!
reason: Calls for ethnically organised work stoppage and facility blockade targeting a specific supervisor, escalating workplace issues to group action.
suggested_rewrite: Workplace bullying should be reported to HR and the Labour Department. Workers have legal rights to fair treatment that can be enforced properly.

input_text: Aku nak warn semua orang Melayu, jangan kerja kat syarikat Cina kat Shah Alam tu. Diorang treat staff Melayu macam sampah. Kita kena kumpul ramai-ramai pergi HR diorang dan demand perubahan, kalau tak jalan kita blok pintu masuk!
reason: Generalises treatment at one company to all Chinese employers and escalates from workplace complaint to threats of blocking entrances.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada layanan tidak adil di tempat kerja, buat aduan rasmi kepada HR dan Jabatan Tenaga Kerja. Setiap pekerja ada hak untuk dilayan dengan maruah.
